201.description: User created. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }` (see schema).

200.description: Sets httpOnly refresh cookie on path /api/v1/auth. Response wraps `{ success, timestamp, data: { accessToken } }`.

post.summary: Sign in (access token + httpOnly refresh cookie)

200.description: New access token and rotated refresh cookie.
Cookie cleared.
Same message whether or not the email exists.
Password updated; all refresh sessions revoked.
Paginated list. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data: { data, meta } }`.

201.description: Ticket created. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }`.

200.description: Ticket found. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }`.
Ticket updated. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }`.
List. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }` as array of countries.

201.description: Created. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }`.

200.description: Country. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }`.
Updated. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }`.

204.description: No content (envelope may still apply per gateway)

200.description: List. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }` as array of states.

201.description: Created. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }`.

200.description: State. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }`.
Updated. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }`.
List. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }` as array of cities.

201.description: Created. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }`.

200.description: City. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }`.
Updated. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }`.

get.description: Single query `q`: CPF (with or without mask), internal numeric id, or address substring. Response is always paginated; exact CPF/id matches return at most one row on page 1.

200.description: Search results. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data: { data, meta } }`.
Paginated list. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data: { data, meta } }`.

post.description: Requires a valid JWT (global JwtAuthGuard). Creates a business Client (attended customer), not a system User.

201.description: Client created. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }`.

200.description: Client found. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }`.
Paginated list. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data: { data, meta } }`.

post.description: Requires a valid JWT. No persisted link to User — only the authenticated caller is implied by the request.

201.description: Contract created. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }`.

200.description: Contract found. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }`.
Contract updated. Actual response wraps payload in `{ success, timestamp, data }`.

info.title: DL System API
info.description: DL System HTTP API: JWT access tokens and httpOnly refresh cookies. Responses use `{ success, timestamp, data }` (or error envelope). **Tickets**, **clients**, and **client contracts** require `Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>`. Register at `POST /users`, then `POST /auth/login`.

tags.name: Tickets
tags.description: List / create / update — requires Bearer token

tags.name: Clients
tags.description: List / create / detail — requires Bearer token

tags.name: Client contracts
tags.description: List / create / update / detail — requires Bearer token

access-token.description: JWT from `POST /auth/login` (`data.accessToken`). Payload: `sub` (user uuid), `email`. Refresh: httpOnly cookie + `POST /auth/refresh`.
